title: PPIP - Login during Onboarding - Share Data toggle is not present
scenario: Share Data toggle is hidden in App Settings > General > Account for logged-in Poly users, as data sharing is automatically enabled
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Log in with valid Poly credentials.
4. Navigate to App Settings > General > Account.
expected: The 'Share Data' toggle is not present in App Settings > General > Account, because logged-in users are automatically allowed to send data.
